zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Achalm於大約1030年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 雷特林根艾寧根 武特 阿哈爾姆阿哈爾姆時，她的父親Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm42歲，母親Adelheid von Wülflingen34歲。她於大約1048年與Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1105年9月30日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆蓋森費爾德享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Achalm于大约1030年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 雷特林根艾寧根 武特 阿哈爾姆阿哈爾姆时，她的父亲Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm42岁，母亲Adelheid von Wülflingen34岁。她于大约1048年与Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1105年9月30日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆蓋森費爾德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Achalm was born about 1030, in Achalm, Eningen unter Achalm, Reutlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm, was 42 and her mother, Adelheid von Wülflingen, was 34. She married Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen about 1048. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 September 1105, in Geisenfeld, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Achalm est née environ 1030, à Achalm, Eningen unter Achalm, Landkreis Reutlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Wülflingen, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen environ 1048. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 septembre 1105, à Geisenfeld, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Achalm um 1030 in Achalm, Eningen unter Achalm, Landkreis Reutlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm 42 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Wülflingen 34. Sie hat um 1048 Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. September 1105 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Geisenfeld, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Achalm è nata il circa 1030 nel Achalm, Eningen unter Achalm, Landkreis Reutlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Wülflingen, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen circa 1048. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1105, nel Geisenfeld, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Achalmが約1030年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス レウトリンジェンエニンジェン ウンター アチャルムアチャルムで生まれた時，父Rudolf I. Graf von Achalmは42歳，母Adelheid von Wülflingenは34歳であった。約1048年にKuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1105年9月30日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス プファフエンhオフン アン ダー イルムジェイセンフエルドで76歳で死去した。

ko.Geisenfeld, Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bav: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 그이센펠드
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Achalm(이)가 대략 1030년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 레우틀링 이닝 운터 아차름 아차름에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Wülflingen(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1048년 Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1105년 9월 30일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 그이센펠드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Achalm nasceu aproximadamente 1030, em Achalm, Eningen unter Achalm, Landkreis Reutlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Wülflingen, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen aproximadamente 1048. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1105, em Geisenfeld, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemanha, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Achalm родилась около 1030 г. в местности ачэлм, энинген унтир ачэлм, ландкрис реутлинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Wülflingen, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen около 1048 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 сентября 1105 г. в местности джисенфелд, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Achalm nació aproximadamente 1030, en Achalm, Eningen unter Achalm, Landkreis Reutlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Rudolf I. Graf von Achalm, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Wülflingen, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Kuno Graf von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen aproximadamente 1048. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1105, en Geisenfeld, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 76 años.
